data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 5/15 (Mon), Commissions rewards will be doubled! 
Don't miss out this chance to get Activity Reports and Credit Points!

🗓️Period: 5/15 (Mon) 19:00 – 5/29 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
